Meet Ruchi

R

Ruchi founded Phonics Land to help children build a genuine love of reading — through play, not worksheets or screens. She holds a B.E. and a Diploma in Early Childhood Care & Education, and has spent years teaching phonics in person, and now online as well — working one-on-one and in small groups with students across India and abroad.

Every family gets a personal connection — Ruchi checks in directly with parents and adapts her teaching to how each child learns best.

English Hindi Gujarati Ages 3–13

Programs

For ages 3 to 13, taught one-on-one and in small groups — with recitation, storytelling, debates, and presentations woven in along the way to build confidence as much as vocabulary.

Phonics Foundations

Letter sounds, blending, and phonemic awareness for early readers.

Reading & Writing

Sight words, sentence building, and creative writing practice.

Grammar & Composition

Structured grammar taught through stories, not endless worksheets.

English Language Support

Ongoing support building confidence, fluency, grammatical structure, and vocabulary — ages 3–13, alongside school curriculum.

Workshops

Grammar workshops conducted for mothers, covering key concepts to reinforce learning at home.

What to Expect

A look at what a typical session actually involves.

1

Warm-up & sound review

A few minutes revisiting sounds and words from the last session, so nothing's forgotten between classes.

2

Guided reading & writing

Focused, one-on-one or small-group practice at the child's actual level — not a fixed script everyone follows the same way.

3

An activity or game

Play is how the ideas actually stick — a short game, story, or activity built around whatever was just practiced.

4

Wrap-up & take-home practice

A quick recap, and something small to reinforce at home before the next session.

Books Recommended for Reading

A starter list by age group — Ruchi updates this regularly with new favorites.

Ages 3–6

  • The Very Hungry Caterpillar — Eric Carle
  • Brown Bear, Brown Bear, What Do You See? — Bill Martin Jr.
  • Dr. Seuss's ABC — Dr. Seuss

Ages 7–9

  • Charlotte's Web — E.B. White
  • The Magic Tree House series — Mary Pope Osborne
  • Matilda — Roald Dahl

Ages 10–13

  • Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone — J.K. Rowling
  • Percy Jackson: The Lightning Thief — Rick Riordan
  • Wonder — R.J. Palacio

Common Questions

What most parents ask before getting started.

What age should my child start?

Phonics Land takes children from age 3 through 13. Younger children usually start with sound and letter foundations; older children join for reading, writing, grammar, or ongoing English support alongside school.

Are classes online, in person, or both?

Both. Ruchi teaches in person at Sola Road, Ahmedabad, and online for families further away — including students outside India.

One-on-one or group classes?

Both formats are available. Many families start one-on-one and move into a small group once a child is comfortable — whatever fits your child best.

How much does it cost, and what are the timings?

This varies by program and format. Message on WhatsApp or email below and Ruchi will share current fees and available time slots.

Will I know how my child is progressing?

Yes — Ruchi checks in directly with parents rather than leaving updates to a single term-end report, so you're not left guessing between sessions.

Get in Touch

Reach out anytime — happy to answer questions about classes and schedules.
